cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. First, let's list out all the times Leslie was seen doing different activities. Leslie woke up at 5am. Then, Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. So during that time, Leslie was at school. Then Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. After that, Thomas saw Leslie at the bakery from 11am to 4pm. Then Ashley saw Leslie at the electronics store fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. Finally, Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Now, the beach was closed after 10pm, so Leslie couldn't have gone after that.
